recommendations.title: Monster Island
recommendations.overview: In the Pacific, 1944, a Japanese soldier and a British prisoner of war are stranded on a deserted island, hunted by a deadly creature. Two mortal enemies must come together to survive the unknown.

recommendations.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon: Sword of Destiny
recommendations.overview: A story of lost love, young love, a legendary sword and one last opportunity at redemption.

recommendations.title: Drunken Master
recommendations.overview: After getting into trouble, a mischievous young man is sent to train under a brutal, but slovenly old beggar, who teaches him the secret of the Drunken Fist.

recommendations.title: Teddy
recommendations.overview: In a rural French town, twenty-something Teddy is scratched by an unknown beast and slowly undergoes frightening changes.
